Bus Timings

Latest F34 Bus Schedule Ibn Battuta Metro Station to Dubai Production City

March 18, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0

UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dubai F34 Bus Timetable- We know that Dubai is one of everyone’s dream cities. Many of people around the world want to visit this city at least once in your life. Knowing the bus time and route is very important in this city, because if you know it, you will enjoy the landmark and the panorama the city well.

Among the array of bus routes, the F34 stands out as a vital link connecting key areas such as Ibn Battuta Metro Station, Dubai Internet City, Discovery Gardens, Dubai Sports City, International Media Production Zone (IMPZ), and Dubai Production City. Contents

F34 Bus Timetable

One of the crucial aspects of any bus route is its timing and frequency, ensuring that commuters can rely on timely transportation. The F34 bus providing passengers with a reliable mode of transport to reach their destinations promptly.

Whether you’re heading to work, running errands, or exploring the city’s attractions, the F34 schedule offers convenience and peace of mind. And here is f34 bus timetable, you can save it on your phone as your guide when you want to try this bus.

From Ibn Battuta Metro Station From Dubai Production City
05:05 05:58
06:00 06:53
06:20 07:13
06:40 07:33
07:00 07:53

07:45 08:38

00:00

Download PDF Bus F34

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link to access the F34 Bus Timings.## F34 Route and Landmarks

The F34 bus route in Dubai serves as a lifeline for commuters traveling between Ibn Battuta Metro Station and Discovery Gardens.

Along its journey, the bus passes through significant landmarks and neighborhoods, catering to the diverse needs of passengers. Here’s a breakdown of the key stops along the F34 route:- Ibn Battuta Metro Station

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE
  • Dubai Internet City
  • Al Barsha Heights
  • Jebel Ali Horse Racecourse
  • Sports City:
  • International Media Production Zone
  • Dubai Production City

Some other Dubai bus routes you can explore include the F18, which passes through Oud Metha Metro Station and Sunrise City Supermarket, as well as the 33, which runs between Qusais Bus Station and Al Ghubaiba Bus Station.Read Also: Abu Dhabi A1 Bus Timetable ## Convenience and Accessibility

The F34 bus route is designed to enhance accessibility and connectivity for residents and visitors across various neighborhoods and commercial hubs in Dubai.

With its strategic stops at metro stations, business districts, leisure destinations, and residential areas, the F34 caters to the diverse needs of commuters.

Whether you’re a daily commuter traveling to work or a tourist exploring the city, the F34 route offers a cost-effective and environmentally friendly mode of transportation.## Journey Experience

Though the journey is lengthy, it provides a fascinating look at Dubaiâ€™s blend of vibrant urban life and its expanding business sectors, offering a deeper understanding of the cityâ€™s continuous development.## Conclusion

In conclusion, the F34 bus route plays a vital role in Dubai’s public transportation system, connecting key areas and facilitating smooth journeys for passengers.

With its convenient timing, strategic stops, and accessibility features, the F34 route exemplifies Dubai’s commitment to sustainable urban mobility and seamless connectivity.

Whether you’re commuting to work, exploring the city, or simply enjoying a leisurely ride, the F34 bus offers a hassle-free and enjoyable travel experience in the vibrant city of Dubai. And the F34 bus timetable above is very useful for the expatriates or the tourists who visit the city.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: March 18, 2026.
